mapper.select: SELECT COMPETENCY_ID AS competencyId, CALC_TYPE AS calcType, SCORE_DELTA AS scoreDelta FROM COMPETENCY_ACTION_SCORE_POLICY WHERE CALC_TYPE = #{calcType} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY COMPETENCY_ID

WITH course_skill_count AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS skill_count FROM COURSE_SKILL cs WHERE cs.COURSE_ID = #{courseId} ), course_skill_source AS ( SELECT cs.SKILL_ID, NVL(cs.WEIGHT, 0) AS WEIGHT FROM COURSE_SKILL cs WHERE cs.COURSE_ID = #{courseId} AND NVL(cs.WEIGHT, 0) > 0 ), chapter_skill_raw AS ( SELECT chs.SKILL_ID, SUM(NVL(chs.WEIGHT, 0)) AS RAW_WEIGHT FROM COURSE_CHAPTER cc JOIN CHAPTER_SKILL chs ON chs.CHAPTER_ID = cc.CHAPTER_ID WHERE cc.COURSE_ID = #{courseId} AND cc.USE_YN = 'Y' AND NVL(chs.WEIGHT, 0) > 0 AND (SELECT skill_count FROM course_skill_count) = 0 GROUP BY chs.SKILL_ID ), chapter_skill_source AS ( SELECT csr.SKILL_ID, csr.RAW_WEIGHT / NULLIF(SUM(csr.RAW_WEIGHT) OVER (), 0) AS WEIGHT FROM chapter_skill_raw csr ), course_skills AS ( SELECT SKILL_ID, WEIGHT FROM course_skill_source UNION ALL SELECT SKILL_ID, WEIGHT FROM chapter_skill_source ) SELECT scs.COMPETENCY_ID AS competencyId, scs.CALC_TYPE AS calcType, SUM(scs.SCORE_DELTA * course_skill.WEIGHT) AS scoreDelta FROM SKILL_COMPETENCY_SCORE scs JOIN course_skills course_skill ON 1 = 1 JOIN SKILL skill ON skill.SKILL_ID = course_skill.SKILL_ID WHERE scs.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ( course_skill.SKILL_ID = scs.SKILL_ID OR skill.PARENT_SKILL_ID = scs.SKILL_ID ) GROUP BY scs.COMPETENCY_ID, scs.CALC_TYPE HAVING SUM(scs.SCORE_DELTA * course_skill.WEIGHT) > 0 ORDER BY scs.COMPETENCY_ID, scs.CALC_TYPE

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COURSE_SKILL current_skill WHERE current_skill.COURSE_ID = #{courseId} AND NVL(current_skill.WEIGHT, 0) > 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM COURSE_LEARNING_STATUS cls JOIN COURSE_SKILL previous_skill ON previous_skill.COURSE_ID = cls.COURSE_ID WHERE cls.USER_ID = #{userId} AND cls.COURSE_ID != #{courseId} AND cls.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND previous_skill.SKILL_ID = current_skill.SKILL_ID )

SELECT streak.USER_ID FROM ( SELECT ll.USER_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT TRUNC(ll.EVENT_AT)) AS ACTIVE_DAYS FROM LEARNING_LOG ll WHERE ll.EVENT_AT >= #{targetDate} - (#{streakDays} - 1) AND ll.EVENT_AT < #{targetDate} + 1 GROUP BY ll.USER_ID ) streak WHERE streak.ACTIVE_DAYS = #{streakDays}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO USER_COMPETENCY_SCORE target USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{competencyId} AS COMPETENCY_ID, #{scoreDelta} AS SCORE_DELTA FROM DUAL ) source ON ( target.USER_ID = source.USER_ID AND target.COMPETENCY_ID = source.COMPETENCY_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.SCORE = LEAST(100, target.SCORE + source.SCORE_DELTA), target.CALCULATED_AT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( USER_SCORE_ID, USER_ID, COMPETENCY_ID, SCORE, CALCULATED_AT ) VALUES ( USER_COMPETENCY_SCORE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, source.USER_ID, source.COMPETENCY_ID, LEAST(100, 70 + source.SCORE_DELTA), SYSDATE )
